Photo Transfer Manager is a native macOS app for quickly sorting and transferring photos from an SD card to an external drive.

What it does:

- detects an inserted SD card
- scans shoot dates on demand
- lets you map each date to an existing folder or a new folder name
- shows the final destination path before transfer
- transfers one day or selected days
- tracks transfer progress live
- opens source files in Finder
- ejects the SD card from the app when finished

Install:

1. Download `photo-transfer-manager-<version>-macos.zip`
2. Unzip it
3. Move `Photo Transfer Manager.app` into `Applications`
4. Right-click the app and choose `Open` the first time

Notes:

- This is an unsigned macOS build shared through GitHub Releases.
- macOS may warn on first launch; using right-click -> `Open` will allow it to run.
